HGSS.729.0000:
I have removed the boulder that was
in the way, but it may still take some\r
time to flatten the ground...
HGSS.729.0001:
The roadwork is finally finished.\f
Now I can go fishing again.
HGSS.729.0002:
Sorry. This road is closed for
construction.\f
If you want to get to Cinnabar, you’d
better go south from Pallet Town.
HGSS.729.0003:
I’m all sweaty.
Time for a swim!
HGSS.729.0004:
Rt. 19 Fuchsia City to
Seafoam Islands
HGSS.729.0005:
What’s this notice?\f
Please be careful if you are swimming
to Seafoam Islands.\r
Fuchsia Police
